formula:
final p Г§ t k вҶ’ b c d Дҹ before a vowel
suffix D = d / t by voicing

body.md: **Softening:** when a suffix starting with a *vowel* attaches, a final voiceless stop voices: *kitapвҶ’kitabДұ*, *aДҹaГ§вҶ’aДҹacДұ*, *kanatвҶ’kanadДұ*, *Г§ocukвҶ’Г§ocuДҹu*. Many one-syllable words resist it (*atвҶ’atДұ*).
**Consonant harmony:** a suffix written with `D` starts with **t** after a voiceless consonant (p Г§ t k f s Еҹ h), otherwise **d**: *kitap-ta* but *ev-de*.

body.gloss: kitap + Дұ вҖ” p softens to b

highlight.note: p вҶ’ b before a vowel

body.gloss: kitap + DA вҖ” voiceless p picks t
